summary: SKYN iteration 2 — backend & frontend re-tested against the new spec. Updated pytest suite to the new profile shape (age_range/environment/priority) and new report shape (no hydration/elasticity). Added 4 tests for the NEW endpoint POST /api/recommendations covering 401, invalid token, exactly-3-strings response, and GPT-4o source confirmation. All 18/18 backend tests PASS. Manual re-confirmation: /api/recommendations returns source='gpt-4o' with 3 personalized French strings. Frontend web preview: /auth screen displays the single 'SE CONNECTER VIA GOOGLE / APPLE' CTA (testID auth-main-button), exact GDPR copy (testID auth-gdpr), Playfair Display + DM Sans loaded, auth-google-button is hidden on the initial screen and appears only inside the bottom-sheet modal after tapping the main CTA. Apple button correctly hidden on web (iOS-only). Strict bicolor #0D0D0D / #E8D5C0 visually respected.

minor.issue: Returns 422 (Pydantic body validation) before 401 when called with invalid body and no auth header. Cosmetic — when body is valid and no auth, correctly returns 401. Carried over from iteration 1.

issues: Computed style audit detected one off-palette value rgb(242,242,242) on a non-visible underlying DIV (likely react-native-web root reset). Not user-visible in the rendered screen (screenshot confirms strict bicolor). Non-blocking — main agent can leave as-is or set body backgroundColor to #0D0D0D explicitly.

action_items: Optional: set explicit html/body { background:#0D0D0D } in web entry to eliminate the underlying rgb(242,242,242) default (purely cosmetic, not user-visible).

Camera (expo-camera), 7s cinematic analysis, dashboard chart, profile-setup horizontal swipe and offline AsyncStorage sync still cannot be exercised on the static web preview — please validate manually on iOS device / simulator before release.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py POST /api/recommendations correctly: (1) authenticates via Bearer, (2) strips data: prefix and caps base64 at ~3MB, (3) uses LlmChat + ImageContent + UserMessage from emergentintegrations with gpt-4o, (4) parses {recommendations:[…]} JSON via regex with strict validation, (5) deterministic French fallback when LLM key missing or any exception occurs. Solid.
Report and Profile Pydantic models cleanly dropped legacy fields (hydration/elasticity, age/feeling/goal). MongoDB writes go through model_dump so legacy keys are not persisted on new docs.
auth.tsx correctly hides auth-google-button until the bottom-sheet modal opens (Modal visible state) and gates auth-apple-button on Platform.OS === 'ios' only — matches spec exactly.
FastAPI on_event startup/shutdown is deprecated (carry-over from iter 1) — migrate to lifespan handlers when convenient.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_skyn_api.py (rewritten for new profile/report shape + new /recommendations tests)

success_rate.frontend: 100% on testable web surface (auth screen). Camera/analysis/dashboard/profile-setup require native device.

seed_data_creation: Apple synthetic sessions created with TEST_ prefix in email/apple_user_id. Reports created with TEST_-prefixed recommendation strings. No production data touched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend stable. Profile uses age_range/environment/priority (strings). Reports use texture/radiance/imperfections/global_score/recommendations (no hydration/elasticity). New endpoint POST /api/recommendations needs Bearer auth + {image_base64, global_score, texture, radiance, imperfections} and returns {recommendations:[3 strings], source:'gpt-4o'|'fallback'}. GPT-4o currently functional. Auth screen testIDs: auth-main-button (opens modal), auth-gdpr, auth-sheet-backdrop, auth-google-button (modal-only), auth-apple-button (iOS-only). Use /api/auth/apple/session with TEST_ apple_user_id to obtain Bearer token bypassing OAuth.
